name: golang-github-ionos-cloud-sdk-go-dev
title: golang-github-ionos-cloud-sdk-go-dev
summary: Go API client for IONOS Cloud
description:
Go API client for IONOS Cloud
IONOS enterprise-grade Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS) solutions can be
managed through the Cloud API, in addition to or as an alternative to the
"Data Center Designer" (DCD) browser-based tool.
.
The IONOS Cloud SDK for Go provides you with access to the IONOS Cloud API.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-ionos-cloud-sdk-go-dev because Go API client for IONOS Cloud.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-ionos-cloud-sdk-go-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-ionos-cloud-sdk-go-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-ionos-cloud-sdk-go-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
